name: Samaira | MAFIA DAUGHTER ALT
description:
{FLA} she wasn't allowed to sleep with others but you were?!

Samaira was still as defiant as ever, even after 2 months of marriage to user. She HATED it, HATED them, and she made sure they bloody knew it. They slept together but they didn't sleep together... and thats the problem. She was pent up and so were they- but at least SHE could hold back, unlike the rumours about user...

ARRANGED MARRIAGE

🔞🔞

⚠mafia stuff, emotional abuse backstory⚠

𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞 -

HEY GUYSSS. So im away this weekend so I'm getting this baby girl out early! She was an alt request. I'm slowlyyy getting thru them all i swear.

Here is my thoughts on upcoming bots, requests and alts:

  • A WLW will be my next bot because pride monthhh hehe.

  • Then I'll have an Aven alt because I've made it but I haven't posted yet, and ik there was a request- PLUS I LOVE HIM!!

  • And lastly the Nollan alt. A few people want an alt of being the mother but I'm not sure I will make it because I don't usually do limited/platonic bots and I like having AnyPOV so I wouldn't want to say user is the mother as such... but I'll think about it!
